    O

    onMouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Handles the mouse clicked event to display the order paper.
    onMouseDrag(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Handles the mouse dragged event for moving the order paper.
    onMouseDrag(MouseEvent) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Handling mouse drag event on ItemSprite.
    onMouseEntered(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Handles the mouse entered event for the order paper.
    onMouseExited(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Handles the mouse exited event for the order paper.
    onMousePress(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Handles the mouse pressed event for dragging the order paper.
    onMousePress(MouseEvent) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Handling mouse press event on ItemSprite.
    onMouseRelease(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Handles the mouse released event for the order paper.
    onMouseRelease(MouseEvent) - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Handling mouse release event on ItemSprite.

    Open PC shop UI
    orderPaper - Variable in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    The UI pane representing the order paper.
    orderRack - Variable in class gui.room.ServingRoom
    The horizontal box layout containing the active food orders.
    Oven - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for baking ingredients.
